name: Chicken and Dumpling Casserole (Cor Ii)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion, celery, and garlic in butter until tender.
2. Add flour, sugar, salt, basil, pepper, and broth; bring to a boil. Cook and stir for 1 minute. Reduce heat.
3. Add peas and cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly. Stir in chicken.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
5. For dumplings, combine biscuit mix and basil in a bowl. Stir in milk with a fork until moistened.
6. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto casserole (12 dumplings).
7. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes. Cover and bake an additional 10 minutes or until dumplings are done.
YIELD: 6-8 servings
